word: H2680 - חֲצִי הַמְּנַחְתִּי - Chătsîy ham-Mᵉnachtîy - khat-see' ham-menakh-tee' - Half of the Manahethites

sections.paragraph:
Original: חצי המּנחתּי

Transliteration: chătsı̂y hammenachtı̂y

Phonetic: khat-see' ham-men-akh-tee'

BDB Definition:

(half of the) Manassites = see Manasseh " causing to forget"
  1. half of the Manassites; also spelled like 2679

Origin: patronymically from H2679

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
